podcast.title: Norah's Notes
podcast.description: Giggles, jokes, and imaginative stories told by a seven-year-old
podcast.author: Norah Tashner

episodes.title: Welcome to Norah's Notes!
episodes.description: In our very first episode, Norah introduces herself and shares some of her favorite jokes and a silly story.

episodes.title: The Magic Treehouse Adventure
episodes.description: Norah takes us on an imaginative journey to a magical treehouse where anything can happen!

episodes.title: Silly Animal Friends
episodes.description: Join Norah as she tells funny stories about her favorite silly animals and what adventures they get into.

episodes.title: The Best Jokes Ever
episodes.description: Norah shares her collection of the funniest jokes she knows. Get ready to laugh!

episodes.title: Bedtime Stories
episodes.description: Cozy up for some gentle bedtime stories perfect for winding down at the end of the day.
